name: android-dev-tools
description: Android development toolkit for Claude Code - build performance, remote signing, documentation generation with md file migration, foldable screen support, and marketplace management with local sync

plugins.name: android-dev-tools
plugins.description: All-in-one Android development toolkit. Includes: gradle-build-performance, apply-remote-sign, update-docs (with md file migration), android-fold-adapter, and update-remote-plugins (with local sync).
